zh.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise於1162年出生。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1196年享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise于1162年出生。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1196年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Molise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan (Moliné): occupational name for a miller, from moliner miller. This surname is also found in southern France.
French and Jewish (from France): altered form of   Molina  , a surname of Spanish and Catalan origin.

variants.name: Molina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Ana, Roberto.  Portuguese Joao, Margarida.

Spanish, Catalan, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from any of numerous places called Molina, in particular the one in Guadalajara province. This surname is also found in France (compare   Moline  ). For certain Jewish families, this is an adoption of the Iberian surname at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Molin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Gunard, Jarl, Nils.  French Moliere, Pascale, Victoire.

Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from mo ‘sandy heath’ + the suffix -lin, derived from Latin -(l)inius ‘relating to’, or from the root of Latin molinarius ‘miller’ or mola ‘mill’ + the suffix -in, derived from Latin -inius ‘relating to’.

nameMeanings.name: Ruggeiro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise was born in 1162. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1196, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise est né en 1162. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1196, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise wurde 1162 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1196 im Alter von 34 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise è nato il nel 1162. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1196, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Moliseは1162年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1196年に34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise(은)는 1162년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1196년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise nasceu em 1162. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1196, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise родился в 1162 г. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1196 г. в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Ruggeiro Di Molise nació en 1162. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1196, a la edad de 34 años.
